summary: First-run E2E test of CropVision AI. 32/32 pytest backend tests pass (auth, fields, detections, alerts, RBAC, inference pipeline with real Claude Sonnet 4.5 vision + full 5-node LangGraph trace, n8n webhook, observability). Fixed one real backend 500 bug on POST /api/fields (MongoDB _id leaking into response). Frontend E2E via Playwright covered landing (EN/HI toggle), farmer/agronomist/admin login, dashboard fields+alerts+trend, real image scan → sonner toast → success, RBAC redirects, agronomist queue (11 items), admin pipeline+audit — all pass. One UX gap: dashboard-field-card is not clickable / has no link to FieldDetail. Real Claude vision + LangGraph return valid outputs (e.g. 'No Disease Detected - Invalid Image', 100% confidence) and reasoning_trace contains all 5 nodes.

minor.issue: Previously returned 500 due to Mongo _id (ObjectId) leaking into response. FIXED by testing agent (added doc.pop('_id') before return).
Webhook is effectively unauthenticated in dev — `api_key` mismatch only triggers `pass`. Fine per user's choice but should be gated in prod.
Farmer can enqueue against another owner's field only if they know the ID; RBAC works (403). No priority issue.

ui_bugs.issue: dashboard-field-card is not clickable and contains no <Link> to /fields/:id — users cannot navigate to FieldDetail from the dashboard/fields list. Route exists but no entry point in UI.

issues: Recharts logs 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings on first render (container mounts before size resolved). Chart renders correctly after resize, purely a console warning.

action_items: Add navigation from dashboard-field-card to /fields/:id (wrap card content or the field name in <Link to={`/fields/${f.id}`}> in both Dashboard.jsx and FieldsList) so users can access the FieldDetail page which shows history + LangGraph reasoning trace.
(Optional) Silence Recharts initial 0-dim warning by giving the ResponsiveContainer a minHeight.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py POST /api/fields returned `doc` after motor's insert_one mutates it with an ObjectId — always pop `_id` or return a fresh model_dump(). Fixed in place.
server.py rate_limit uses in-memory dict keyed by client IP — fine for single pod, will not scale horizontally.

server.py `_process_job` retry logic increments attempts inside the RUNNING update but the `attempts >= max_attempts` check compares against the pre-update value from `cur.attempts` (which is post-increment). Edge case: could retry once more than expected. Non-blocking.
auth.require_role has admin bypass (`user.role == ADMIN`) — good, and consistent with UX (admin can access agronomist queue). Documented in code comment would help.

vision.py: bare-except in analyze_crop_image falls back to `_fallback` even on parse errors — logs warning but pipeline never fails hard. Good resilience, but detection may look 'succeeded' with `_offline: true` — recommend surfacing that flag to admin dashboard.
AuthContext: no refresh-on-mount retry on 401 (relies on axios interceptor). Fine.
Dashboard.jsx SAMPLE_LEAF_B64 is a tiny 40x40 JPEG — used when file input is empty. Consider warning user if no file is chosen.

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all critical flows pass; one UX gap (no click-to-detail on field cards)

test_credentials: farmer@cropvision.ai/farmer123, agronomist@cropvision.ai/agro123, admin@cropvision.ai/admin123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md; all verified working via login)
seed_data_creation: Used pre-existing seed (3 users, 6 fields, 43 detections+alerts). Tests also created several TEST_field_* entries; farmer field count is now 8.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env; run with: `cd /app/backend && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://agri-sense-9.preview.emergentagent.com pytest tests/backend_test.py -v`. Real Claude 4.5 vision + LangGraph run takes ~15-20s per job. Real crop image fixture at /app/test_fixtures/crop_leaf.jpg. UI has one open action item: make dashboard-field-card link to /fields/:id.
